name: brandgenome-cfo-operating-dashboard
description: Static CFO operating dashboard with sanitized live Cafe24, paid-media, and BOK FX extracts.

scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const f of ['index.html','mock_api_contract.json','mock_data_snapshot.json']) { if (!fs.existsSync(f)) throw new Error(f + ' missing'); } console.log('static dashboard package ok');"
